title: OpenAI 產品時間線資料集 v0.1

methodology.scope: Publicly observable OpenAI product, model, platform, client, enterprise, safety, and lifecycle updates after ChatGPT's launch.
methodology.source_policy: Official OpenAI pages only; extraction uses read-through snapshots while every delivered citation points to the canonical official URL.
methodology.canonicalization: Raw source entries are parsed, normalized, deduplicated by date/product/title similarity, scored, and sampled across every family and quarter for the 326-node map edition.
methodology.completeness_boundary: Living changelogs can be edited retroactively. Raw parsed entries and explicit coverage records are preserved so gaps remain inspectable.
methodology.translation_boundary: Curated lane records carry reviewed Traditional Chinese text. Parser-only records use concise bilingual labels and a factual Chinese provenance summary; the official English source remains authoritative for detailed wording.

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced ChatGPT as a free research preview, using a conversational format that could answer follow-up questions, acknowledge mistakes, challenge incorrect premises, and reject inappropriate requests.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 以免費研究預覽形式推出 ChatGPT；其對話介面能回答追問、承認錯誤、質疑不實前提並拒絕不當要求。

events.summary_en: We're excited to announce several updates to ChatGPT! Here's what's new: 1. General performance: Among other improvements, users will notice that ChatGPT is now less likely to refuse to answer questions.

events.summary_en: OpenAI began testing a daily ChatGPT message cap for some users, with extended access available in exchange for feedback.

events.summary_en: OpenAI announced a $20-per-month ChatGPT plan with peak-time access, faster responses, and priority access to new features.

events.summary_en: As we recently announced, our Plus plan comes with early access to new, experimental features. We are beginning to roll out a way for Plus users the ability to choose between different versions of ChatGPT: Default: the standard ChatGPT model

events.summary_en: On June 6th, 2024, we notified developers using gpt-4-32k and gpt-4-vision-preview of their upcoming deprecations in one year and six months respectively. As of June 17, 2024, only existing users of these models will be able to continue using them. Schedule/replacements: 2025-06-06 gpt-4-32k $60.00 / 1M input tokens + $120 / 1M output tokens gpt-4o; 2025-06-06 gpt-4-32k-0613 $60.00 / 1M input tokens + $120 / 1M output tokens gpt-4o;…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-06-06 公告 GPT-4-32K and Vision Preview models 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

events.title_en: ChatGPT integration announced for Apple Intelligence
events.title_zh: 宣布 ChatGPT 整合 Apple Intelligence
events.summary_en: OpenAI and Apple announced GPT-4o-powered ChatGPT integration for Siri and systemwide Writing Tools in iOS, iPadOS, and macOS, with no account required for free access.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 與 Apple 宣布將 GPT-4o 驅動的 ChatGPT 整合至 iOS、iPadOS 與 macOS 的 Siri 和系統級 Writing Tools，免費使用無須帳戶。

events.title_en: Released GPT-4o mini, our affordable an intelligent small model for fast, lightweight tasks.
events.summary_en: Released GPT-4o mini , our affordable an intelligent small model for fast, lightweight tasks.
events.summary_zh: 推出：GPT-4o mini , our affordable an intelligent small 模型 for fast, lightweight tasks。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-07-18 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: We’re introducing GPT-4o mini, the most capable and cost-efficient small model available today. GPT-4o mini surpasses GPT-3.5 Turbo and other small models on academic benchmarks across both textual intelligence and multimodal reasoning and supports the same range of languages as GPT-4o. It also demonstrates strong performance in function calling, which can enable developers to build applications that fetch data or take actions with e…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-07-18 為 GPT-4o 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.summary_en: Launched fine-tuning for GPT-4o mini , enabling even higher performance for specific use cases.
events.summary_zh: 推出：fine-tuning for GPT-4o mini , enabling even higher performance for specific use cases。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-07-23 的更新；重點涉及模型微調、可靠性與效能修正，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: Launched self-serve SSO configuration , allowing Enterprise customers on custom and unlimited billing to set up authentication against their desired IDP.
events.summary_zh: 推出：self-serve SSO configuration , allowing Enterprise customers on custom and unlimited billing to set up authentication against their desired IDP。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-07-24 的更新；重點涉及定價與用量，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a temporary search prototype to a small group of users and publishers, combining conversational models with timely web answers and explicit source links.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向少量使用者與出版商推出暫時性的搜尋原型，結合對話模型、即時網路答案與清楚的來源連結。

events.summary_en: Launched Structured Outputs —model outputs now reliably adhere to developer supplied JSON Schemas. Released gpt-4o-2024-08-06 , our newest model in the gpt-4o series.
events.summary_zh: API 推出 Structured Outputs。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-08-06 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: Released dynamic model for chatgpt-4o-latest —this model will point to the latest GPT-4o model used by ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: 推出：dynamic 模型 for chatgpt-4o-latest —this 模型 will point to latest GPT-4o 模型 used by ChatGPT。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-08-15 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: GA release for gpt-4o-2024-08-06 fine-tuning —all API users can now fine-tune the latest GPT-4o model.
events.summary_zh: API 更新：GA release for gpt-4o-2024-08-06 fine-tuning —all API users can now fine-tune latest GPT-4o 模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-08-20 的功能；重點涉及模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: 記憶功能擴展至各 ChatGPT 方案
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded Memory to Free, Plus, Team, and Enterprise users and added visible memory-update notices with direct access to memory management.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將記憶擴展至 Free、Plus、Team 與 Enterprise，並新增可見的記憶更新提示與直接管理入口。
events.source_name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

source_refs.name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

events.summary_en: OpenAI released o1-mini as a faster, cheaper reasoning model focused especially on coding, initially available alongside o1-preview to ChatGPT Plus and Team users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布速度更快、成本更低且特別聚焦程式工作的推理模型 o1-mini，首波與 o1-preview 一同向 ChatGPT Plus 與 Team 開放。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released the first preview of its reasoning model series in ChatGPT and the API, designed to spend more time thinking through difficult science, coding, and math problems.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 與 API 發布首個推理模型系列預覽，設計上會花更多時間思考困難的科學、程式與數學問題。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling GPT-4o-native Advanced Voice to Plus and Team users with low-latency conversation, nonverbal-cue awareness, and emotional expressiveness.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Plus 與 Team 推出 GPT-4o 原生的 Advanced Voice，具低延遲對話、非語言線索感知與情緒表達。

events.title_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco
events.title_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新
events.summary_en: Released several new features at OpenAI DevDay in San Francisco : Realtime API : Build fast speech-to-speech experiences into your applications using a WebSockets interface. Model distillation : Platform for fine-tuning cost-efficient models with your outputs from a large frontier model. Image fine-tuning : Fine-tune GPT-4o with images and text to improve vision capabilities. Evals : Create and run custom evaluations to measure model…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI DevDay API 與代理平台更新。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-10-01 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊、圖像與影片、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT Windows App 早期版本
events.summary_en: OpenAI released an early Windows app for Plus, Team, Enterprise and Edu, including an Alt+Space companion window.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 推出 Windows App 搶先版，包含 Alt-Space Companion Window。

events.title_en: Released new gpt-4o-audio-preview model for chat completions
events.summary_en: Released new gpt-4o-audio-preview model for chat completions, which supports both audio inputs and outputs. Uses the same underlying model as the Realtime API .
events.summary_zh: 推出：全新 gpt-4o-audio-preview 模型 for chat completions, which supports both audio inputs and outputs。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-10-17 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: OpenAI integrated web search into ChatGPT with automatic or manual activation, timely answers, source links, and new visual treatments for weather, stocks, sports, news, and maps.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將網路搜尋整合進 ChatGPT，可自動或手動啟動，提供即時答案、來源連結，以及天氣、股票、運動、新聞與地圖的新視覺呈現。

events.title_zh: Advanced Voice 登陸 ChatGPT Web
events.summary_en: Starting today, we’re beginning to roll out Advanced Voice Mode on web (already available on mobile and desktop apps). You can now start a voice chat on chatgpt.com on your desktop and have real-time, natural conversations with ChatGPT while doing tasks like shopping, planning, writing, and brainstorming. We’re starting to roll out to all paid (Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu) users today, and expect it to take a few days.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-11-19 為 ChatGPT Voice 調整方案、額度或計費；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_zh: 推出：gpt-4o-2024-11-20 , our newest 模型 in gpt-4o series.
events.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released gpt-4o-2024-11-20, our newest model in the gpt-4o series.
events.summary_zh: 推出：gpt-4o-2024-11-20 , our newest 模型 in gpt-4o series。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-11-20 的更新；重點涉及平台功能與可用性，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: ChatGPT Web sidebar and responsive-experience redesign
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Web 側邊欄與響應式體驗改版
events.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out a floating sidebar, revised conversation and GPT navigation, an updated composer, improved Canvas coexistence, and a more robust mobile web experience.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出浮動側邊欄、改版的對話與 GPT 導覽、新輸入列、更佳 Canvas 並列顯示，以及更穩健的行動網頁體驗。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a $200-per-month plan with unlimited access to o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and Advanced Voice plus access to o1 pro mode.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出每月 200 美元的方案，提供 o1、o1-mini、GPT-4o 與 Advanced Voice 無上限使用，以及 o1 pro mode。

events.title_en: Full OpenAI o1 released in ChatGPT
events.title_zh: 完整版 OpenAI o1 登陸 ChatGPT
events.summary_en: OpenAI made the production o1 model available in ChatGPT alongside the new Pro plan, presenting it as its most intelligent model for difficult reasoning tasks.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 隨新的 Pro 方案在 ChatGPT 中提供正式版 o1，並將其定位為處理困難推理工作的最智慧模型。

events.summary_en: OpenAI moved Sora out of research preview by launching the faster Sora Turbo as a standalone product for Plus and Pro users, with storyboards, remixing, blending, and up to 1080p 20-second output.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Sora 移出研究預覽，向 Plus 與 Pro 推出更快的獨立產品 Sora Turbo，具 Storyboard、Remix、Blend 與最高 1080p、20 秒輸出。

events.title_en: Canvas becomes default in GPT-4o for all users
events.title_zh: Canvas 成為所有使用者的 GPT-4o 預設能力
events.summary_en: OpenAI made Canvas available by default in GPT-4o to both free and paid ChatGPT users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Canvas 設為 GPT-4o 的預設可用能力，向 ChatGPT 免費與付費使用者全面開放。

events.summary_en: Today we made Canvas available in 4o by default for all users, Free and Paid. Additionally, we launched a number of new capabilities for canvas, including: Canvas in GPTs: Canvas can now be used with GPTs when enabled in the GPT creator. This toggle will be enabled for newly created GPTs by default.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2024-12-10 為 ChatGPT 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: Canvas gains GPTs, Python execution, and shortcuts
events.title_zh: Canvas 新增 GPT、Python 執行與捷徑
events.summary_en: Canvas gained optional use inside GPTs, Python code execution with automatic bug-fix attempts, paste-to-canvas shortcuts, and a toolbox entry.
events.summary_zh: Canvas 新增在 GPT 中選用、Python 程式碼執行與自動修錯嘗試、貼上即開 Canvas 的捷徑，以及工具箱入口。

events.title_en: Video and screen sharing in Advanced Voice
events.title_zh: Advanced Voice 支援視訊與螢幕分享
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling real-time video, screen sharing, and image uploads in Advanced Voice on mobile to Team and most Plus and Pro users outside several European regions.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在行動版 Advanced Voice 向 Team 與多數 Plus、Pro 使用者推出即時視訊、螢幕分享與圖像上傳，部分歐洲地區除外。

events.summary_en: Projects provide a new way to group files and chats for personal use, simplifying the management of work that involves multiple chats. You can set custom instructions and upload files in your Projects, and any conversations in your Project share context with your uploaded files and custom instructions. Chats in Projects use GPT-4o and support the following features:
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team 與 Pro 推出 Projects，可將檔案、聊天與自訂指示集中並共享專案上下文，支援 Canvas、資料分析、DALL-E 與 Search。

events.title_en: ChatGPT Search available to all logged-in users
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Search 開放所有已登入使用者
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Search from paid plans to every logged-in user in regions where ChatGPT was available.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Search 從付費方案擴展至 ChatGPT 可用地區的所有已登入使用者。

events.title_en: Added new models for o1, gpt-4o-realtime, gpt-4o-audio and more.
events.title_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型
events.summary_en: Added new models for o1 , gpt-4o-realtime , gpt-4o-audio and more . Added WebRTC connection method for the Realtime API . Added reasoningeffort parameter for o1 models. Added developer message role for o1 model. Note that o1-preview and o1-mini do not support system or developer messages. Launched Preference Fine-tuning using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) . Launched beta SDKs for Go and Java. Learn more . Added Realtime API su…
events.summary_zh: API 推出 o1‑preview 與 o1‑mini 推理模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-12-17 的功能；重點涉及即時語音與音訊、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: 推出：Launched Admin API Key Rotations
events.summary_en: Launched Admin API Key Rotations , enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys. Updated Admin API Invites , enabling customers to programmatically invite users to projects at the same time they are invited to organizations.
events.summary_zh: 推出：Admin API Key Rotations , enabling customers to programmatically rotate their admin api keys。OpenAI 將此列為 2024-12-18 的功能；重點涉及企業管理控制，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: OpenAI o3 and o3-mini preview announced
events.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI o3 與 o3-mini 預覽
events.summary_en: OpenAI previewed its next reasoning-model family, o3 and o3-mini, and opened an early-access program for safety and security researchers rather than a general product release.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 預覽下一代推理模型系列 o3 與 o3-mini，並向安全與資安研究者開放搶先測試；當時尚非一般產品發布。

events.summary_en: Today we’re rolling out a beta version of tasks—a new way to ask ChatGPT to do things for you at a future time. Whether it's one-time reminders or recurring actions, tell ChatGPT what you need and when, and it will automatically take care of it. Scheduled tasks is in early beta for Plus, Pro, and Teams. Eventually this will be available to anyone with a ChatGPT account. For details see Scheduled tasks in ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: 我們今日推出預排任務的測試版本，讓 ChatGPT 能在未來為您執行任務。無論是一次性提醒或重複性操作，只需告知 ChatGPT 需求與時間，系統將自動處理。預排任務目前正於 Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案中進行早期測試。

events.title_zh: 從聊天視窗匯入至 Canvas
events.summary_en: Edit a full model response in Canvas Edit a code block in Canvas Web only (no desktop or mobile in this release).
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-01-15 為 ChatGPT 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released Operator as a U.S. research preview for ChatGPT Pro: an agent powered by the Computer-Using Agent model that can use its own browser to type, click, scroll, and perform web tasks under user control.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 針對 ChatGPT Pro 在美國推出 Operator 研究預覽版。這是一個由「電腦使用代理模型」(Computer-Using Agent model) 驅動的代理，能在使用者控制下，利用自身瀏覽器進行輸入、點擊、捲動及執行網路任務。

events.summary_en: We’re excited to release o3-mini, our newest cost-efficient reasoning model optimized for coding, math, and science. On the API, o3-mini supports Structured Outputs, function calling, developer messages, and streaming. It offers three adjustable reasoning efforts (low, medium, and high), so you can balance speed with depth for your use case.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 o3-mini，這是一款針對程式撰寫、數學及科學進行最佳化的具成本效益推理模型，並提供予 ChatGPT 免費版、付費方案以及 API 使用。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched deep research in ChatGPT for multi-step web research that finds, analyzes, and synthesizes many online sources into cited reports; the initial rollout began with Pro users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 Deep Research，用於進行多步驟網路研究，能搜尋、分析並整合多項線上來源，彙整成附註引用的報告；初期先向 Pro 使用者開放。

events.summary_en: Users can now share a Canvas asset such as rendered React/HTML code, document, or code with another user, similar to how you share a conversation. You can do this from the Canvas toolbar when Canvas is open. For more details about the canvas feature in ChatGPT, check out the following Help Center article!
events.summary_zh: 使用者現可與他人分享 Canvas 資產（例如已渲染的 React/HTML 程式碼、文件或程式碼），方式與分享對話類似。當 Canvas 開啟時，可透過工具列執行此操作。如需關於 ChatGPT Canvas 功能的更多詳細資訊，請查看說明中心文章。

events.summary_en: We’re releasing a research preview of GPT-4.5—our largest, and best model for chat, yet. GPT-4.5 is a step forward in scaling up pretraining and post-training. By scaling unsupervised learning, GPT-4.5 improves its ability to recognize patterns, draw connections, and generate creative insights without reasoning. Early testing shows that interacting with GPT-4.5 feels more natural. Its broader knowledge base, improved ability to follo…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-4.5 作為研究預覽版，這是當時其最大的聊天模型，初期先向全球 ChatGPT Pro 使用者開放，後續將陸續擴展至其他付費方案。

events.title_en: Released a research preview of GPT-4.5
events.title_zh: 發布a 研究預覽 of GPT-4.5
events.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Released a research preview of GPT-4.5—our largest and most capable chat model yet. GPT-4.5's high "EQ" and understanding of user intent make it better at creative tasks and agentic planning.

events.summary_en: Released several new models and tools and a new API for agentic workflows: Released the Responses API , a new API for creating and using agents and tools. Released a set of built-in tools for the Responses API: web search , file search , and computer use . Released the Agents SDK , an orchestration framework for designing, building, and deploying agents. Announced new models: gpt-4o-search-preview , gpt-4o-mini-search-preview , compu…
events.summary_zh: 推出：several 全新 模型 and tools and a 全新 API for agentic workflows: Released Responses API , a 全新 API for creating and using agents and tools。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-03-11 的功能；重點涉及棄用與遷移、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: 推出 4o 影像生成功能
events.summary_en: OpenAI integrated native image generation into GPT-4o, adding stronger text rendering, detailed instruction following, in-context image editing, and multi-turn refinement in ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將原生影像生成整合至 GPT-4o，在 ChatGPT 中增加了更強的文字渲染、細緻的指令遵循、上下文影像編輯以及多輪修正功能。

events.title_zh: 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 ChatGPT 中退役
events.summary_en: OpenAI announced that GPT-4 would be retired from ChatGPT on April 30, 2025 and replaced by GPT-4o; GPT-4 remained available in the API.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 2025 年 4 月 30 日從 ChatGPT 退役，並由 GPT-4o 取代；GPT-4 仍可在 API 中使用。

events.title_en: Added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, and gpt-4.1-nano models to the API.
events.title_zh: API 推出 GPT‑4.1、mini 與 nano
events.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, and gpt-4.1-nano models to the API. These new models feature improved instruction following, coding, and a larger context window (up to 1M tokens). gpt-4.1 and gpt-4.1-mini are available for supervised fine-tuning. Announced deprecation of gpt-4.5-preview.
events.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑4.1、mini 與 nano。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-04-14 的功能；重點涉及棄用與遷移、模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-04-14 為 GPT-4.5 公布淘汰計畫；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.summary_en: All images you create with ChatGPT are now automatically saved to a new Library in the sidebar, giving you one place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without digging through past conversations. The Library is rolling out today on Web, iOS, and Android for Free, Plus, and Pro users (Enterprise / Edu support coming soon). For now, it displays images generated with 4o Image Generation while we backfill older creations, and you ca…
events.summary_zh: 所有您使用 ChatGPT 建立的影像現在都會自動儲存到側邊欄的新「影像庫」中，讓您能在一處瀏覽、回顧並重複使用您的作品，無需翻找過往的對話紀錄。此影像庫今日於網頁版、iOS 與 Android 平台上向 Free、Plus 與 Pro 使用者推出（企業版/教育版支援即將推出）……

events.title_en: Added two new o-series reasoning models, o3 and o4-mini.
events.title_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini 推理模型
events.summary_en: Added two new o-series reasoning models, o3 and o4-mini . They set a new standard for math, science, and coding, visual reasoning tasks, and technical writing. Launched Codex, our code generation CLI tool.
events.summary_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini 推理模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-04-16 的功能；重點涉及Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: OpenAI o3 在 ChatGPT 中推出
events.summary_en: OpenAI released o3 in ChatGPT as a reasoning model for complex coding, math, science, and visual-analysis tasks, with access to ChatGPT tools.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o3，這是一個用於複雜程式開發、數學、科學和視覺分析任務的推理模型，並可使用 ChatGPT 工具。

events.title_zh: OpenAI o4-mini 在 ChatGPT 中推出
events.summary_en: OpenAI released o4-mini in ChatGPT as a smaller, faster, cost-efficient reasoning model with high usage limits and strong math, coding, and visual performance.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o4-mini，這是一個更小、更快、且具成本效益的推理模型，具有高使用限制以及強大的數學、程式開發和視覺效能。

events.title_zh: 具備搜尋功能的記憶功能
events.summary_en: ChatGPT can also use memories to inform search queries when ChatGPT searches the web using third-party search providers. Learn more about search.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-04-16 為 ChatGPT Search 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.summary_en: Launched on April 1 as a one-month surprise, our “Monday” personality (available in both voice and text) has now been sunset. We hope you enjoyed Monday's irreverent style, and we’re already working on new personalities for future use. Please stay tuned for what’s next!
events.summary_zh: 作為 4 月 1 日推出的為期一個月的驚喜，我們的「Monday」個性（提供語音和文字版本）現已停用。希望您喜歡 Monday 不拘一格的風格，我們已經在為未來開發新的個性。請持續關注後續內容！

events.summary_en: Launched support for reinforcement fine-tuning . Learn about available fine-tuning methods . gpt-4.1-nano is now available for fine-tuning.
events.summary_zh: 推出強化微調支援。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-05-07 的功能；重點涉及模型微調，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: GitHub connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
events.title_zh: 適用於 Plus/Pro/Team 的深度研究 GitHub 連接器
events.summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with GitHub is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connecting GitHub to ChatGPT deep research.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 深度研究與 GitHub 的整合已向全球 Team 使用者開放。該功能也正逐步向 Plus 和 Pro 使用者推出，但 EEA、瑞士和英國的使用者除外。企業使用者存取權限將於稍後公布。請參閱：將 GitHub 連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究。

events.title_en: Enhanced Memory in ChatGPT (including EU) on Plus/Pro
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Plus/Pro 的增強記憶功能（包含歐盟）
events.summary_en: Enhanced memory rolling out to all Plus and Pro users (including the EU). The new memory features are available in the EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein. These features are OFF by default and must be enabled in Settings Personalization Reference Chat History. • Saved memories and Chat history are offered only to Plus and Pro accounts. • Free‑tier users have access to Saved memories only. • Outside the Euro…
events.summary_zh: 增強記憶功能正向所有 Plus 和 Pro 使用者（包含歐盟）推出。新的記憶功能適用於 EEA（歐盟 + 英國）、瑞士、挪威、冰島或列支敦斯登。這些功能預設為關閉，必須在「設定 個人化 參照對話記錄」中啟用。

events.title_en: Microsoft Sharepoint and OneDrive connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
events.title_zh: 針對 Plus/Pro/Team 的 ChatGPT 深度研究 Microsoft SharePoint 與 OneDrive 連接器
events.summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with Sharepoint and OneDrive is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connecting SharePoint and Microsoft OneDrive to ChatGPT deep research
events.summary_zh: 支援 SharePoint 與 OneDrive 的 ChatGPT 深度研究功能已開放給全球 Team 用戶使用。該功能也正逐步推廣至 Plus 與 Pro 用戶（不含歐洲經濟區、瑞士與英國）。企業用戶的存取權限將於日後另行公告。參考：將 SharePoint 與 Microsoft OneDrive 連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究

events.title_en: Export Deep Research as PDF for Plus/Pro/Team
events.title_zh: 將深度研究匯出為 PDF（適用於 Plus/Pro/Team）
events.summary_en: You can now export your deep research reports as well-formatted PDFs—complete with tables, images, linked citations, and sources. To use, click the share icon and select 'Download as PDF.' It works for both new and past reports.
events.summary_zh: 您現在可以將深度研究報告匯出為格式良好的 PDF，其中包含表格、影像、連結的引用和來源。使用方法：點擊分享圖示並選擇「下載為 PDF」。此功能適用於新的和過去的報告。

events.title_en: Releasing GPT-4.1 in ChatGPT for all paid users
events.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中為所有付費用戶推出 GPT-4.1
events.summary_en: Since its launch in the API in April, GPT-4.1 has become a favorite among developers—by popular demand, we’re making it available directly in ChatGPT. GPT-4.1 is a specialized model that excels at coding tasks. Compared to GPT-4o, it's even stronger at precise instruction following and web development tasks, and offers an alternative to OpenAI o3 and OpenAI o4-mini for simpler, everyday coding needs. Starting today, Plus, Pro, and Te…
events.summary_zh: 自四月於 API 推出以來，GPT-4.1 深受開發者喜愛，應廣大需求，我們現已將其直接導入 ChatGPT。GPT-4.1 是一款擅長程式編寫任務的專業模型……

events.title_en: Introducing GPT-4.1 mini, replacing GPT-4o mini, in ChatGPT for all users
events.title_zh: 推出 GPT-4.1 mini，取代 ChatGPT 中所有用戶的 GPT-4o mini
events.summary_en: GPT-4.1 mini is a fast, capable, and efficient small model, delivering significant improvements compared to GPT-4o mini—in instruction-following, coding, and overall intelligence. Starting today, GPT-4.1 mini replaces GPT-4o mini in the model picker under "more models" for paid users, and will serve as the fallback model for free users once they reach their GPT-4o usage limits. Rate limits remain the same. Evals for GPT-4.1 and GPT-4…
events.summary_zh: GPT-4.1 mini 是一款快速、強大且高效的小型模型，相較於 GPT-4o mini 在指令遵循、程式編寫及整體智慧能力上有顯著提升……

events.title_en: Launched codex-mini-latest in the API, optimized for use with the Codex CLI.
events.summary_en: v1/chat/completions Launched codex-mini-latest in the API, optimized for use with the Codex CLI.
events.summary_zh: 推出：codex-mini-latest in API, optimized for use with Codex CLI。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-05-15 的功能；重點涉及Codex 編碼代理，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: Dropbox connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
events.title_zh: 針對 Plus/Pro/Team 的 Dropbox 深度研究連接器
events.summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with Dropbox is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connect apps to ChatGPT deep research
events.summary_zh: 支援 Dropbox 的 ChatGPT 深度研究功能已開放給全球 Team 用戶使用。該功能也正逐步推廣至 Plus 與 Pro 用戶（不含歐洲經濟區、瑞士與英國）。企業用戶的存取權限將於日後另行公告。參考：將應用程式連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究

events.title_zh: 用於深度研究的 GitHub 連接器
events.summary_en: The GitHub connector is now available globally to Plus/Pro/Team users, including those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-05-15 為 Deep Research 擴大開放範圍；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched the Codex cloud software-engineering agent in research preview, powered by codex-1 and capable of working on multiple tasks in isolated cloud sandboxes.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Codex 雲端軟體工程代理的研究預覽版；它由 codex-1 驅動，可在隔離的雲端沙盒中同時處理多項任務。

events.title_en: New model snapshots available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview.
events.summary_en: New model snapshots available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview . Released Agents SDK for TypeScript .
events.summary_zh: API 更新：全新 模型快照 available for gpt-4o-audio-preview and gpt-4o-realtime-preview。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-03 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用、即時語音與音訊，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: Memory is now more comprehensive for Free users
events.title_zh: Memory 功能對免費版用戶更臻全面
events.summary_en: Memory improvements are starting to roll out to Free users. In addition to the saved memories that were there before, ChatGPT now references your recent conversations to deliver responses that feel more relevant and tailored to you. Free users must be logged in and on up-to-date apps (iOS/Android v1.2025.147+). Free users in EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein will see a prompt to enable this setting or can…
events.summary_zh: Memory 功能的改進正陸續向免費版用戶推出。除了先前儲存的記憶外，ChatGPT 現在也會參考您近期的對話，以提供更相關且客製化的回應。免費版用戶需登入並使用最新版本的應用程式（iOS/Android v1.2025.147+）……

events.title_en: Connectors in beta for deep research (Plus, Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
events.title_zh: 用於深度研究的連接器進入 Beta 測試階段（Plus、Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
events.summary_en: ChatGPT Team, Enterprise, and Edu customers globally can use connectors in deep research, as well as Pro and Plus users (excluding users in Switzerland, EEA, and the UK) to generate long-form, cited responses that include your company’s internal tools. Supported connectors: Google Drive, SharePoint, Dropbox, Box, Outlook, Gmail, Google Calendar, Linear, GitHub, HubSpot, and Teams Combines internal + web sources for synthesis Learn mo…
events.summary_zh: 全球的 ChatGPT Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 客戶，以及 Pro 與 Plus 用戶（不含瑞士、歐洲經濟區與英國的用戶），現可於深度研究功能中使用連接器，以生成包含貴公司內部工具資訊的長篇且附帶引用的回應……

events.title_en: Custom connectors via Model Context Protocol (Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
events.title_zh: 透過 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立自訂連接器（Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
events.summary_en: Admins and users can now build and deploy custom connectors to proprietary systems using Model Context Protocol (MCP). Requires a remote MCP server Available only in deep research Admin-published connectors appear in the connector list for all users Learn more about building custom connectors with MCP. For Team, Enterprise, and Edu plans, only admins can build and deploy custom connectors.
events.summary_zh: 管理員與使用者現在可以使用 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立並部署連接至專有系統的自訂連接器。需要遠端 MCP 伺服器，且僅限於深度研究功能中使用。管理員發佈的連接器將出現在所有用戶的連接器清單中。進一步了解如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器……

events.title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for paid users
events.title_zh: 更新：Advanced Voice Mode 面向付費使用者
events.summary_en: We're upgrading Advanced Voice in ChatGPT for paid users with significant enhancements in intonation and naturalness, making interactions feel more fluid and human-like. When we first launched Advanced Voice, it represented a leap forward in AI speech—now, it speaks even more naturally, with subtler intonation, realistic cadence (including pauses and emphases), and more on-point expressiveness for certain emotions including empathy,…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-07 為 ChatGPT Voice 推出新產品或能力；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: Today, we're launching OpenAI o3-pro—available now for Pro users in ChatGPT and in our API.
events.title_zh: 今天，我們推出 OpenAI o3-pro—即日起於 ChatGPT 和 API 中開放給 Pro 使用者。
events.summary_en: Like o1-pro, o3-pro is a version of our most intelligent model, o3, designed to think longer and provide the most reliable responses. Since the launch of o1-pro, users have favored this model for domains such as math, science, and coding—areas where o3-pro continues to excel, as shown in academic evaluations. Like o3, o3-pro has access to tools that make ChatGPT useful—it can search the web, analyze files, reason about visual inputs,…
events.summary_zh: 如同 o1-pro，o3-pro 是我們最聰明模型 o3 的一個版本，旨在進行更長時間的思考並提供最可靠的回應。自 o1-pro 推出以來，使用者在數學、科學和程式設計等領域偏好此模型，而在學術評估中顯示，o3-pro 在這些領域持續表現優異……

events.summary_en: On June 10th, 2025, we notified developers using gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01 of its deprecation and removal from the API in three months. Schedule/replacements: 2025-10-10 gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01 gpt-realtime-1.5
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-10 公告 gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01 的棄用或下線時程，並列出替代方案與遷移方向。

events.title_zh: 為 Projects 增加更多功能
events.summary_en: Starting today, we’re adding several updates to projects in ChatGPT to help you do more focused work. These updates are available for Plus, Pro, and Team users. Deep research and voice mode support Improvements to memory to reference past chats in a project Sharing chats from projects Starting a new project directly from a chat Upload files and access model selector on mobile Learn more about projects. Memory improvements are availab…
events.summary_zh: 即日起，我們為 ChatGPT 中的 Projects 增加多項更新，協助您進行更專注的工作。這些更新適用於 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者……

events.title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
events.title_zh: 擴大 Custom GPTs 的模型支援
events.summary_en: Creators can now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs—making it easier to fine-tune performance for different tasks, industries, and workflows. Creators can also set a recommended model to guide users. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1…
events.summary_zh: 創作者在建立 Custom GPTs 時，現在可以從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇，這讓調整針對不同任務、產業和工作流程的效能變得更加容易。創作者亦可設定推薦模型以引導使用者……

events.title_en: Improvements to the ChatGPT search response quality
events.title_zh: 提升 ChatGPT 搜尋回應品質
events.summary_en: We’ve upgraded ChatGPT search for all users to provide even more comprehensive, up-to-date responses. In testing, we found users preferred these search improvements over our previous search experience. Smarter responses that are more intelligent, are better at understanding what you’re asking, and provide more comprehensive answers. Handles longer conversational contexts, allowing better intelligence in longer conversations. More rob…
events.summary_zh: 我們已升級所有使用者的 ChatGPT 搜尋功能，以提供更全面、即時的回應。在測試中，我們發現使用者更偏好這些搜尋改進，勝過先前的搜尋體驗。回應更聰明、更能理解您的提問，並提供更全面的答案……

events.title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
events.title_zh: 模型發布：Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
events.summary_en: Enterprise and Edu users can also now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs. This was launched to Plus, Pro and Team users earlier this month. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1 Available on web for users on all paid plans (Plus, Pro Tea…
events.summary_zh: Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者現在在建立 Custom GPTs 時，也能從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇。此功能已於本月初對 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者推出。關鍵細節：沒有 Custom Actions 的 GPTs 可以使用模型選擇器，從使用者可用的所有模型中進行選擇……

events.summary_en: Capture meetings, brainstorms, or voice notes. Launching today for Pro, Enterprise, and Edu users. Previously launched for Team users on June 4, 2025. ChatGPT will transcribe, summarize, and turn them into helpful outputs like follow-ups, plans, or even code. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about ChatGPT Record.
events.summary_zh: 捕捉會議、腦力激盪或語音筆記。即日起對 Pro、Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者推出。先前已於 2025 年 6 月 4 日對 Team 使用者推出。ChatGPT 將對其進行轉錄、摘要，並將其轉化為有用的產出，例如後續行動、計畫，甚至是程式碼。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解 ChatGPT Record。

events.title_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini deep research 模型
events.summary_en: Released o3-deep-research and o4-mini-deep-research , deep research variants of our o-series reasoning models optimized for deep analysis and research tasks. Learn more in the deep research guide . Added support for async event handling with webhooks . Reduced and simplified pricing for the web search tool. Added support for the web search tool .
events.summary_zh: API 推出 o3 與 o4‑mini deep research 模型。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-06-24 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.summary_en: Pro users are now able to use chat search connectors (in addition to deep research connectors) for the following integrations: Dropbox, Box, Google Drive (synced and non-synced), Microsoft OneDrive (Business), Microsoft SharePoint. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about Connectors.
events.summary_zh: Pro 使用者現在可以使用聊天搜尋連接器（除深度研究連接器外）進行以下整合：Dropbox、Box、Google Drive（同步與非同步）、Microsoft OneDrive (Business)、Microsoft SharePoint。請注意，此功能目前僅限於位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士和英國以外的使用者使用……

events.summary_en: Projects can now support 40 uploaded files, up from 20, for Pro users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2025-06-24 為 ChatGPT Projects 新增功能；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: Record mode in ChatGPT macOS desktop app (Plus)
events.title_zh: ChatGPT macOS 桌面應用程式中的錄音模式 (Plus)
events.summary_en: Record mode is now available to ChatGPT Plus users globally in the macOS desktop app. Record live conversations like team meetings or voice notes, and turn those into an editable summary in canvas. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about record mode. Note: Record mode originally rolled out to Team users on June 4, and Enterprise & Edu plans on June 18.
events.summary_zh: 錄音模式即日起全球對 ChatGPT Plus 使用者在 macOS 桌面應用程式中開放。錄製現場對話（如團隊會議或語音筆記），並將其轉化為 canvas 中的可編輯摘要。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解錄音模式……

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT agent for Pro, Plus, and Team, combining web interaction, deep research, connected sources, terminal use, and editable artifacts in a user-supervised virtual computer.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 為 Pro、Plus 和 Team 使用者推出 ChatGPT agent，結合網頁互動、深度研究、已連結來源、終端機使用以及可編輯的產出物，並在使用者監督的虛擬電腦中運作。

events.title_zh: 宣佈終止 Operator 獨立體驗
events.summary_en: With Operator functionality integrated into ChatGPT agent, OpenAI announced that the standalone Operator experience at operator.chatgpt.com would be deprecated in the following weeks.
events.summary_zh: 隨著 Operator 功能整合至 ChatGPT agent，OpenAI 宣佈 operator.chatgpt.com 上的獨立 Operator 體驗將於未來幾週內終止。

events.title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for Free tier users
events.title_zh: 免費版用戶的進階語音模式更新
events.summary_en: The Advanced Voice upgrades we announced on June 7th are now rolling out to ChatGPT free users too. With the same improvements available to paid users, ChatGPT sounds more natural and expressive, and can translate more effectively. Rate limits for free users stay the same.
events.summary_zh: 我們於 6 月 7 日宣佈的進階語音升級現已向 ChatGPT 免費版用戶開放。透過與付費版用戶相同的改進，ChatGPT 聽起來更自然、更具表現力，且能更有效地進行翻譯。免費版用戶的速率限制保持不變。

events.title_en: Chat search for HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) (Pro)
events.title_zh: HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP) 的聊天搜尋 (Pro)
events.summary_en: Pro users can now utilize chat search with HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) in addition to deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors, as well as how to create a custom connector using MCP.
events.summary_zh: Pro 用戶除深度研究外，現亦可將聊天搜尋用於 HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP)。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器，以及如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器的資訊。

events.title_zh: Canva 與 Notion 連接器 (Pro)
events.summary_en: Pro users can now connect to Canva and Notion for both chat search and deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors.
events.summary_zh: Pro 用戶現可連接至 Canva 與 Notion，以進行聊天搜尋與深度研究。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器的資訊。

events.summary_en: Study mode is currently available to users in Free, Plus, Pro, and Teams plans globally and will expand to Edu plans in the coming weeks. Study mode works with any model available in ChatGPT on iOS, Android, web, and desktop. Study mode is a new learning experience in ChatGPT designed to help you build a deeper understanding of any topic. When you turn it on, ChatGPT will ask interactive questions to understand your goals and skill l…
events.summary_zh: 學習模式目前向全球 Free、Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案的用戶開放，並將於未來幾週內擴展至 Edu 方案。學習模式適用於 ChatGPT 在 iOS、Android、網頁及桌面版上提供的任何模型。學習模式是 ChatGPT 中的一項新學習體驗，旨在協助您對任何主題建立更深刻的理解。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released two Apache 2.0 open-weight text reasoning models for teams to run and customize on their own infrastructure or hosting providers.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出兩個採用 Apache 2.0 授權的開放權重文字推理模型，供團隊在其自有基礎設施或託管服務供應商上執行並自訂。

events.title_en: Introducing two open-weight models: gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b
events.title_zh: 推出two open-weight models: gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b
events.summary_en: We’re releasing two open-weight reasoning models, gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b. Designed for teams that want to run and customize models on their own infrastructure or with hosting providers, these text-only models support common developer patterns like function calling and structured outputs. For more information, please visit our open models and help center.

events.summary_en: GPT-5 is slowly rolling out to all users on ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Team, and Free plans worldwide across web, mobile, and desktop. GPT-5 will be available to ChatGPT Enterprise and Edu plans soon. GPT-5 in ChatGPT is our next flagship model and the new default for all logged-in users. It simplifies ChatGPT to a single auto-switching system that brings together the best of our previous models into a smart, fast model. GPT-5 is available t…
events.summary_zh: GPT-5 正逐步向全球網頁、行動裝置及桌面版 ChatGPT Plus、Pro、Team 及 Free 方案的所有用戶推出。GPT-5 將於近期向 ChatGPT Enterprise 及 Edu 方案提供。ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5 是我們的新一代旗艦模型，也是所有已登入用戶的新預設模型。

events.title_en: Released GPT-5 family of models in the API
events.title_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5、GPT‑5 mini 與 GPT‑5 nano
events.summary_en: Released GPT-5 family of models in the API, including gpt-5 , gpt-5-mini , and gpt-5-nano . Introduced the minimal reasoning effort value to optimize for fast responses in GPT-5 models (which support reasoning). Introduced custom tool call type, which allows for freeform inputs to and outputs from the model when tool calling.
events.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5、GPT‑5 mini 與 GPT‑5 nano。OpenAI 將此列為 2025-08-07 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: 宣佈淘汰標準語音模式
events.summary_en: OpenAI announced that Standard Voice Mode would be retired in 30 days, moving users to the newer unified Voice experience.

events.summary_en: Today we’re rolling out improvements to Voice Mode to make it more accessible and useful for everyone. It also now works with custom GPTs. We’re expanding access with near-unlimited use for Plus users and hours each day for Free users. To simplify the experience, Standard Voice Mode will be retired in 30 days, unifying all users onto our latest voice experience.

For ₹399/month (GST included), ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). ChatG…

With project-only memory enabled, ChatGPT can use other conversations in that project for additional context, and won’t use your saved memories from outside the project to shape responses. Additionally, it won’t carry anything from the project into future chats outside of the project.…

events.summary_en: IDE extension (Compatible with VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf) Codex now runs in your IDE with an interactive UI for fast local iteration. Easily switch between modes and reasoning efforts. Sign in with ChatGPT (IDE & CLI) One-click authentication that removes API keys and uses ChatGPT Enterprise credits. Move work between local ↔ cloud Hand off tasks to Codex web from the IDE with the ability to apply changes locally so you can delegate…

events.summary_en: The OpenAI Realtime API is now generally available. Learn more in our Realtime API guide .

events.title_zh: 「專案」功能現已開放給 ChatGPT 免費版使用
events.summary_en: Projects bring your chats and files into one place, helping you stay focused and get things done. They’re now available on our Free tier, with up to 5 file uploads per project. events.summary_en: Last month we announced that everyone now has access to Advanced Voice Mode, with usage expanded from minutes per day to hours for Free users, and near-unlimited use for Plus. We also shared that Standard Voice Mode would be retired following a 30-day sunset period. We’ve heard feedback that Standard Voice is special to some folks, and we want to make sure the transition feels right. To that end, we’re keeping Standard Voice availabl…
events.summary_zh: 上個月我們宣佈所有人皆可使用「進階語音模式」，使用量限制從每天幾分鐘擴展至免費使用者每天幾小時，Plus 使用者則為近乎無限。我們同時宣告「標準語音模式」在 30 天的停用過渡期後將正式退役。

Use GPT-5-codex for coding-focused work in Codex, or Codex-like environments; use GPT-5 for general, non-coding tasks. Please review the announcement blog for more information. Note: GPT-5-Codex is not…

events.summary_en: ChatGPT now manages saved memories automatically by keeping the most relevant details prioritized and moving less important ones to the background. This helps prevent saved memories from reaching capacity and helps avoid “memory full” state in your ChatGPT account. To decide which memories stay top of mind, ChatGPT considers factors such as how recent a detail is and how often you talk about a topic. You can now also search your save…
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在透過將最相關的詳細資訊保持在優先位置並將較不重要的資訊移至背景，來自動管理已儲存的記憶。這有助於防止已儲存的記憶達到容量上限，並避免 ChatGPT 帳戶出現「記憶體已滿」的狀態。…

If you hit your included limits, you can seamlessly buy more credits right in the Codex dashboard or buy more video generations in the Sora app to keep going. GPT-5.1 Instant now uses light adaptive reasoning for tougher questions while staying fast, and GPT-5.1 Thinking adapts its thinking time more precisely for complex tasks with clearer, less jargony responses. GPT-5.1 Auto continues to route each query to the best model, and GPT-5 models remain available for three months…

events.summary_en: Released extended prompt cache retention . Extended prompt cache retention keeps cached prefixes active for longer, up to a maximum of 24 hours. Extended Prompt Caching works by offloading the key/value tensors to GPU-local storage when memory is full, significantly increasing the storage capacity available for caching.

events.summary_en: Today we’re updating GPT-5 Pro to GPT-5.1 Pro. In early testing, users consistently preferred GPT-5.1 Pro over GPT-5 Pro, rating it especially highly for writing help, data science, and business questions. Testers highlighted the model’s improved clarity, relevance, and structure in its responses. GPT-5.1 Pro is rolling out today for all ChatGPT Pro users and is available in the model picker. GPT-5 Pro will remain available as a lega…

You can use it in Codex surfaces today, including the CLI, IDE extension, cloud, and code review. Rates are the same as for GPT-5.1-Codex.

events.summary_en: We’re retiring the Voice experience in the ChatGPT macOS app on January 15, 2026. This change allows us to focus on more unified and improved voice experiences across our apps. Voice will continue to be available on chatgpt.com, iOS, Android, and Windows app. No other ChatGPT features on macOS are affected.

events.summary_zh: 我們推出新版 ChatGPT 影像功能，由我們目前最強大的影像生成模型驅動。透過 ChatGPT Images，精確的指令遵循與編輯能力使 AI 影像創作不僅更有趣，且實用性顯著提升——從日常編輯到創意轉換皆適用。

events.summary_en: Today we are releasing GPT-5.2-Codex , the most advanced agentic coding model yet for complex, real-world software engineering. GPT-5.2-Codex is a version of GPT-5.2 further optimized for agentic coding in Codex, including improvements on long-horizon work through context compaction, stronger performance on large code changes like refactors and migrations, improved performance in Windows environments, and significantly stronger cyber…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 已在付費 Codex 介面中推出 GPT-5.2-Codex，具備更強大的長視角軟體工程、上下文壓縮、Windows 效能、視覺及網路安全能力。

events.title_en: App directory in ChatGPT with enterprise controls
events.title_zh: ChatGPT App 目錄與企業控制
events.summary_en: ChatGPT added an app directory and renamed connectors as apps; Enterprise and Edu admins received RBAC and action controls, while developers could submit Apps SDK apps for review.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增 App 目錄並將 connectors 統整為 apps；Enterprise/Edu 管理員可用 RBAC 與動作控制，開發者可提交 Apps SDK App 審核。

events.title_en: Introducing the app directory in ChatGPT
events.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 應用程式目錄
events.summary_en: You can now browse and add approved apps in the new app directory. Apps let you work with your tools and data directly inside a conversation—from interactive in-chat experiences to secure connections that allow ChatGPT to search and reference information from third-party services. As part of this update, connectors now appear in the directory as apps, making it easier to manage all your tools in one place. References across the Help…
events.summary_zh: 您現在可在全新的應用程式目錄中瀏覽並新增經核准的應用程式。這些應用程式讓您能直接在對話中使用工具與資料——從互動式對話體驗，到允許 ChatGPT 搜尋並參照第三方服務資訊的安全連線皆包含在內。

events.summary_en: You can now pin chats to the top of your list for quick access to important conversations. Pinned chats are available on iOS, Android, Web, and Atlas. On web, hover over a chat in the left-hand sidebar, click ⋯, and select Pin chat. On mobile, long-press a chat and select Pin chat.
events.summary_zh: 您現在可將對話釘選至清單頂端，以便快速存取重要對話。聊天釘選功能適用於 iOS、Android、網頁版及 Atlas。在網頁版上，將滑鼠懸停於左側邊欄的對話，點擊 ⋯，然後選擇「釘選聊天」。在行動裝置上，長按對話並選擇「釘選聊天」。

events.summary_en: We’re starting to roll out Health, a dedicated space in ChatGPT for health and wellness conversations. You can securely connect medical records, Apple Health and supported wellness apps so answers can be grounded in your own data. Health is designed to help you navigate medical care, not replace it. Health conversations, memory, and files are kept separate from the rest of ChatGPT and are not used to train our foundation models. Heal…
events.summary_zh: 我們開始推出「健康」功能，這是 ChatGPT 中專為健康與保健對話設計的空間。您可以安全地連結醫療記錄、Apple Health 及受支援的保健應用程式，讓 AI 回覆能基於您的個人資料。此功能旨在協助您了解醫療護理，而非取代醫療服務。

events.title_en: Released gpt-5.2-codex to the Responses API.
events.summary_en: Released gpt-5.2-codex to the Responses API. GPT-5.2-Codex is a version of GPT-5.2 optimized for agentic coding tasks in Codex or similar environments. Read more here .
events.summary_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5.2。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-01-14 的功能；重點涉及Codex 編碼代理、代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_en: Improved memory for finding details from past chats (Plus & Pro)
events.title_zh: 改進對過去對話細節的查找記憶功能 (Plus 與 Pro)
events.summary_en: When reference chat history is enabled, ChatGPT can now more reliably find specific details from your past chats when you ask. Any past chat used to answer your question now appears as a source so you can open and review the original context. This memory improvement is now available for Plus and Pro users globally.
events.summary_zh: 當啟用參考對話記錄時，ChatGPT 現在能更可靠地在您詢問時找到過去對話中的具體細節。任何用於回答您問題的過去對話現在都會作為來源顯示，以便您開啟並查看原始上下文。這項記憶改進功能現已向全球 Plus 和 Pro 用戶開放。

events.summary_en: We’re making an update to ChatGPT Voice for paid users that improves its ability to follow user instructions, as well as fixes a bug where Voice can sometimes repeat back custom instructions.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-01-20 為 ChatGPT Voice 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: Improvements to search response quality in Voice
events.title_zh: 改進語音功能的搜尋回應品質
events.summary_en: We’ve improved search responses in ChatGPT Voice to deliver more complete, up-to-date answers, including better access to shopping results.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-01-26 為 ChatGPT Voice 更新模型或體驗；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
events.title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 及其他舊版模型
events.summary_en: On February 13, 2026, alongside the previously announced retirement⁠ of GPT‑5 (Instant and Thinking), we will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. In the API, there are no changes at this time. For more, see our blog post or help center.
events.summary_zh: 於 2026 年 2 月 13 日，除了先前宣佈停用的 GPT‑5 (Instant 與 Thinking) 外，我們將從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT‑4o、GPT‑4.1、GPT‑4.1 mini 以及 OpenAI o4-mini。API 目前沒有變動。欲了解更多資訊，請參閱我們的部落格文章或說明中心。

events.summary_en: Responses in ChatGPT are now more visual and easier to scan. For everyday questions, responses may include at-a-glance visuals—like checking your team’s latest stats, converting units, or doing a quick calculation. Answers now also highlight important people, places, products, and ideas. You can tap any highlight to open a side panel with key facts and trusted sources, making it easy to understand the context without asking follow-up…
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的回應現在更具視覺效果且更易於快速瀏覽。針對日常問題，回應可能包含一目了然的視覺內容，例如查看您團隊的最新數據、單位換算或進行快速計算。回答內容現在也會突顯重要的人事物、地點、產品與概念。

events.title_zh: 推出 Codex 應用程式
events.summary_en: Today we’re releasing the Codex app for MacOS, a command center for managing multiple coding agents in parallel. The app lets you run long‑horizon and background tasks, review clean diffs from isolated worktrees, see agent progress and decisions, and execute reusable skills and automations. Available with ChatGPT plans that include Codex, with a limited‑time promo: Free and Go can try Codex with included limits, while Plus, and Pro u…
events.summary_zh: 今天我們推出適用於 MacOS 的 Codex 應用程式，這是一個用於並行管理多個程式開發代理的指揮中心。該應用程式讓您能夠執行長週期與後台任務、檢視隔離工作樹中清晰的差異、查看代理的進度與決策，並執行可重複使用的技能與自動化流程。

events.title_en: Update on thinking time settings for GPT-5.2 Thinking in ChatGPT
events.title_zh: 更新 ChatGPT 中 GPT-5.2 Thinking 的思考時間設定
events.summary_en: Jan 10, 2026: We lowered the Standard and Light thinking time as we observed users prefer faster responses. As part of this update, the Extended thinking setting for GPT-5.2 was unintentionally changed to be lower which we have now fixed. February 3, 2026: We made another small reduction to Standard thinking time based on testing. February 4, 2026: We’re restoring the Extended thinking level for GPT-5.2 Thinking to its prior setting,…
events.summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月 10 日：我們降低了「標準」與「輕量」思考時間，因為我們觀察到用戶偏好更快速的回應。作為此更新的一部分，GPT-5.2 的「延長」思考設定被無意間調低，我們現已修正。2026 年 2 月 3 日：根據測試，我們再次小幅縮減了「標準」思考時間。

events.summary_en: Today, we launched GPT-5.3-Codex, our most capable agentic coding model yet. This model is the first that combines Codex + GPT-5 training stacks -- bringing together best-in-class code generation, reasoning, and general-purpose intelligence in one unified model. It’s ~25% faster,sets new highs on key benchmarks, and marks a step-change from code generation to a general-purpose coding agent you can actively steer while it works. Read…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-05 為 GPT-5.3-Codex 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_en: GPT-5.3-Codex in Cursor and VS Code
events.summary_en: Starting today, GPT-5.3-Codex is available natively in Cursor and VS Code. API access is starting with a small set of customers as part of a phased release. This is the first model treated as a high security capability under the Preparedness Framework. Safety controls will continue to scale, and API access will expand over the next few weeks.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026-02-09 為 GPT-5.3-Codex 發布模型；此節點依官方發布記錄整理，完整能力、適用方案與限制請見來源。

events.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT (Free, Go) 測試廣告
events.summary_en: We’re beginning to roll out a test for ads in ChatGPT in the U.S. for logged-in adults on the Free and Go tiers. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans do not have ads. The test will be a subset of users to start. We will expand over the coming weeks as we learn from this test. ChatGPT’s answers are generated independently from advertising. Answers are optimized based on what’s most helpful to you. When you see an ad, t…
events.summary_zh: 我們開始針對美國地區使用 Free 和 Go 層級且已登入的成年使用者，對 ChatGPT 廣告進行測試。Plus、Business、Enterprise 和 Education 方案則不含廣告。測試初期將針對部分使用者開放。隨著測試進展，我們將在未來幾週內擴大測試範圍。ChatGPT 的答案生成與廣告內容無關。…

events.summary_en: We’re introducing improvements to deep research in ChatGPT to help produce more accurate, credible reports with greater control. You can now focus research on specific websites and a larger collection of connected apps as trusted sources. A redesigned sidebar entry point and fullscreen report view make it easier to start, review, and manage research in one place. Create and edit a research plan before it begins, and track progress wi…
events.summary_zh: 我們為 ChatGPT 中的深度研究功能推出各項改進，旨在協助產出更準確、可信且具備更高控制度的報告。您現在可以將研究聚焦於特定網站，並將更多已連結的應用程式作為受信任的資訊來源。…

events.summary_en: Today, we’re releasing a research preview of GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark , a smaller version of GPT-5.3-Codex and our first model designed for real-time coding. Codex-Spark is optimized to feel near-instant, delivering more than 1000 tokens per second while remaining highly capable for real-world coding tasks. Codex-Spark is available in research preview for ChatGPT Pro users in the latest Codex app, CLI, and IDE extension. This release also…
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark 作為 Pro 研究預覽版：這是一個較小型的即時程式碼模型，於 Cerebras 硬體上執行，速度超過每秒 1,000 個 token。

events.summary_en: We’re making an update to ChatGPT Voice that improves its ability to follow user instructions, and usage of tools like web search to provide better responses. This update applies to the version of Voice primarily used by those on the free ChatGPT plan, and by Plus users when limits are reached for the main model.
events.summary_zh: 我們對 ChatGPT Voice 進行了更新，提升其遵循使用者指令的能力，並改進對網頁搜尋等工具的使用，從而提供更優質的回應。此更新適用於主要供免費版 ChatGPT 使用者，以及在主要模型達到用量限制時供 Plus 使用者使用的 Voice 版本。

events.title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
events.title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 與其他舊型模型
events.summary_en: As previously announced, we have retired GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. We are also retiring GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking), as previously announced. There are no API changes at this time. For details, see our blog post and Help Center.
events.summary_zh: 正如先前宣布，我們已從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-4.1 mini 和 OpenAI o4-mini。我們也如先前宣布，停用 GPT-5 (Instant 和 Thinking)。目前 API 沒有變更。詳細資訊請參閱我們的部落格文章與說明中心。

events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出供高風險用戶選用的 Lockdown Mode，並為 ChatGPT、Atlas 與 Codex 中可能增加 prompt injection 風險的能力加上 Elevated Risk 標籤。

events.title_en: Add sources to your projects from anywhere
events.title_zh: 從任何地方將來源新增至您的專案
events.summary_en: Projects now make it easy to build a living knowledge base by adding sources wherever your context already lives; from apps, conversations, or quick text inputs. Sources from apps: Paste a link to a Slack channel or Google Drive file or folder to add it directly as a project source. Additionally, use connected apps directly in chats. Sources from chats: Save useful ChatGPT responses into your project so great outputs become reusable…
events.summary_zh: 現在，透過在您現有的上下文環境中新增來源，專案能更輕鬆地建立動態知識庫；這些來源可來自應用程式、對話或快速文字輸入。來自應用程式的來源：貼上 Slack 頻道或 Google Drive 檔案或資料夾的連結，即可直接將其新增為專案來源。此外，還能直接在聊天中使用已連結的應用程式……

events.summary_en: Released gpt-5.3-chat-latest to the Chat Completions and Responses API. This model points to the GPT-5.3 Instant snapshot currently used in ChatGPT. Read more here .
events.summary_zh: 推出：gpt-5.3-chat-latest to Chat Completions and Responses API。OpenAI 將此列為 2026-03-03 的功能；重點涉及代理與工具調用，模型、端點與參數名稱依官方英文保留。

events.title_zh: Windows 版 Codex 應用程式
events.summary_en: The Codex app is now available on Windows for ChatGPT plans that include Codex. The app gives users a Windows desktop surface for running multiple Codex agents in parallel, with isolated worktrees and reviewable diffs that can be edited, discarded, or turned into a pull request. Users can sign in with ChatGPT from the app and keep work moving across the app, CLI, and IDE without switching between tools for every task. Learn more: Usi…
events.summary_zh: Codex 應用程式現已在 Windows 上推出，適用於包含 Codex 的 ChatGPT 方案。該應用程式為使用者提供了一個 Windows 桌面介面，用於平行執行多個 Codex 代理，並具備可編輯、捨棄或轉為 Pull Request 的隔離工作區與可檢視的差異檔 (diffs)……

events.summary_en: GPT‑5.4 brings together the best of our recent advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into a single frontier model. It incorporates the industry-leading coding capabilities of GPT‑5.3‑Codex⁠ while improving how the model works across tools, software environments, and professional tasks involving spreadsheets, presentations, and documents. The result is a model that gets complex real work done accurately, effectively, an…
events.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 將我們在推理、程式設計和代理式程式開發工作流程方面的最新進展集結至單一前沿模型中。它整合了 GPT-5.3-Codex 業界領先的程式設計能力，同時改善了模型在工具、軟體環境以及涉及試算表、簡報和文件的專業任務中的運作方式……

events.summary_en: GPT-5.4 is now available in Codex as OpenAI’s most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work. It combines recent advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows in one model, and it’s the recommended choice for most Codex tasks. In Codex, GPT-5.4 is the first general-purpose model with native computer-use capabilities. GPT-5.4 in Codex includes experimental support for the 1M context window. It supports complex…

events.summary_en: As of March 11, 2026, GPT-5.1 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.1 Instant, GPT-5.1 Thinking, and GPT-5.1 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.1 will automatically continue on the corresponding current model: GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, or GPT-5.4 Pro.
events.summary_zh: 自 2026 年 3 月 11 日起，GPT-5.1 模型不再於 ChatGPT 中提供。這適用於 GPT-5.1 Instant、GPT-5.1 Thinking 和 GPT-5.1 Pro。先前使用 GPT-5.1 的對話將自動在對應的現行模型上繼續：GPT-5.3 Instant、GPT-5.4 Thinking 或 GPT-5.4 Pro。

events.title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.4 mini in Codex
events.summary_en: GPT-5.4 mini is now available in Codex as a fast, efficient model for lighter coding tasks and subagents. It improves over GPT-5 mini across coding, reasoning, image understanding, and tool use while running more than 2x faster. In Codex, GPT-5.4 mini uses 30% as much of your included limits as GPT-5.4, so comparable tasks can last about 3.3x longer before you hit those limits. GPT-5.4 mini is available in the Codex app, the CLI, the…

events.title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano
events.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.4 mini and nano as faster, efficient models for high-volume coding, computer-use, tool-use, and subagent workloads; mini also became available in ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano，作為針對大量程式開發、電腦使用、工具使用和子代理工作負載更快速、高效的模型；mini 也已在 ChatGPT 中提供。

events.title_en: Released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano to the Chat Completions and Responses API.
events.title_zh: API 推出 GPT‑5.4 mini 與 GPT‑5.4 nano
events.summary_en: Released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano to the Chat Completions and Responses API. events.summary_en: We’re deprecating Atlas as we bring browser-based agentic capabilities into ChatGPT and Codex. Atlas is scheduled to stop working on August 9, 2026. We want to make this transition as easy as possible. Before then, move any Atlas data you want to keep. Atlas browser data, including bookmarks, open tabs, and browser history, will not transfer automatically. You can export your cookies and passwords to the ChatGPT desktop app and your…
events.summary_zh: 我們將棄用 Atlas，並將基於瀏覽器的代理能力引入 ChatGPT 和 Codex。Atlas 預定於 2026 年 8 月 9 日停止運作。我們希望使此轉換盡可能順利。在此之前，請移動您希望保留的任何 Atlas 資料。包含書籤、開啟的分頁和瀏覽記錄在內的 Atlas 瀏覽器資料將不會自動傳輸。

events.summary_en: OpenAI announced that Atlas is being deprecated as browser-agent capabilities move into ChatGPT and Codex; Atlas is scheduled to stop working on August 9, 2026.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布棄用 Atlas，將瀏覽器代理能力移入 ChatGPT 與 Codex；Atlas 預計於 2026-08-09 停止運作。
events.source_name: Evolving Atlas into ChatGPT for browser-based agentic work

events.title_en: Plugin Directory replaces the App Directory
events.title_zh: Plugin Directory 取代 App Directory
events.summary_en: OpenAI replaced ChatGPT's App Directory with the Plugin Directory. Existing app connections remain in place, while plugins can package skills, apps, and app templates for ChatGPT Work, Codex, web, and desktop workflows.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 以 Plugin Directory 取代 ChatGPT 的 App Directory。現有的應用程式連結保持不變，而外掛程式可為 ChatGPT Work、Codex、網頁和桌面工作流程封裝技能、應用程式和應用程式模板。
